quotes.text: The best time to build good habits is when you don't need them. The worst time is when you desperately do.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to create systems is before you need them. The second best time is when you're drowning in chaos.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to think about security is before you ship. The second best time is after you've been breached.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to add health checks is before you need them. Not during an incident.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to add logging is before you need it. The second best time is during the incident you're having.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to set up analytics is before you launch. Not after you've been flying blind for 3 months.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build a brand is before you need one. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to manage your time is when you have too much of it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build your personal brand is before you need it. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to check in with a customer is when things are going well. Not just when they're not.
quotes.author: based
